programmes.show_description: A man is attacked by a gang of robbers attempting to steal his phone, leaving him badly injured. Mark and Tom witness an accident when a motorcyclist and pillion rider come off a bike.

programmes.show_name: The Push: Death on a Cruise Ship
programmes.show_description: During a cruise with her ex-husband, Micki Kanesaki disappeared. This documentary lifts the lid on an extraordinary case involving FBI, private investigators, phone tapping and death threats.
Detectives in the Incident Room must work tirelessly to find and bring to justice four ruthless teens who killed 63-year-old Gurmail Singh in his Huddersfield corner shop.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

In Northamptonshire, Matt collects an untaxed vehicle with four punctured tyres from a residential area, and officers stop a car whose driver and passengers are not wearing seatbelts. (Ep7)
Can Graeme Hall restore harmony after Pomeranian-cross Leo bites a hand that feeds? And Mel is at her wits' end with her Schnauzers' impact on her canine couture business.
Tane's world is turned upside down. Can Jo really trust her new boyfriend? Cash fears for his friend.
A woman uses the old "I was just making a call" excuse to avoid paying for goods, and a London team dealing with shoplifting and anti-social behaviour handle a disruptive gang. (Ep18)
Private detectives Steve and Adam are on the case of a prolific thief. Tom and Vasim get an SOS: a suspected offender has entered premises and is known to be quick on his feet. (Ep19)
In Newton Abbot, one of the most prolific shoplifters in town is spotted huddled in a doorway, and in Liverpool, security officers foil an attempt at a dodgy supermarket sweep. (Ep20)
Near York, a young man who's stolen his grandfather's car leads the police into a bizarre and dangerous pursuit that ends in a trip to hospital for the youngster.
In North Yorkshire, cops are out in force, protecting lorry drivers and their cargo as organised gangs target goods and trucks. Ther's a hijack on an HGV carrying £1million of goods.
In Leeds the cops are on the look out for a stolen Ford Fiesta; their hunt ending in a dramatic foot chase pursuing one of the mouthiest criminals they've ever seen.
On a busy Bank Holiday weekend, a day trip to Scarborough turns into a high-speed pursuit and a desperate suspect on a motorbike puts lives at risk when a passenger falls off.
The interceptors smash down a door to save a man's life, and a fleeing Land Rover rams two cop cars in a bid to get away.
The Cumbrian interceptors tackle a woman trapped inside a burning car, a bad boy racer, a bullock breakout and drink-related incidents on Black Eye Friday.
A drunken driver is in the fast lane of the M6, dog handler Glenn is given a crash course in marine rescue, and Duggie is called to the scene of a crash.
A routine stop uncovers a large haul of cash, a van driver tries to ram an officer off the M6, and a school bus crashes on a country road.
A man is brutally beaten to death in a Lancashire basement squat in the early hours. With the only suspect denying any involvement, can detectives separate the truth from the lies?
...The Virginia McCullough Confessions. In 2023, Virginia was charged with murdering her parents. This documentary explores how she lived alongside her parents' dead bodies for five years.
On July 4, 2017 Jorge Rodriguez is shot while buying tomatoes for a family event in Washington. He dies seeking help. Days later, 17-year-old Pedro Cardenas is arrested after a tip-off.
Evie Adams longed to recreate the happy, loving family she'd found in her adoptive parents, but the man in her life wanted only to destroy it.
Dr Natalia Spierings struggles to see acne hidden with makeup by a patient. Dr Toby Nelson is shocked by a patient's DIY attempt on a cyst. Dr Adil Sheraz tackles a stubborn lipoma.
Witnessing a car crime bonanza captured by drones, CCTV, dashcams, mobile phones and police bodycams - from road raging drivers to ram raids gone wrong and high-tech car thieves.
"Team Wiki Woo" competes against the Eggheads.
The "Think Tank" tries to defeat the Eggheads.

Singer Laura Elen begins to plan the biggest day of her life - getting wed! With just six months to go, she needs to get planning, starting with the florist.
Singer Nikki G prepares for an emotionally-charged performance after losing her performance partner Stevie and raising 1500 euros for a cancer charity in his honour.
In Graeme Hall's first case he turns marriage counsellor to break up a furry love triangle. And at a retirement home for rescue dogs, a resident Romanian bites the hand that feeds him.
In an episode focusing on young drivers, a silver Astra leads Dan on a 100mph chase down before U-turning into oncoming traffic.
In an episode focusing on shoplifters, Julian pursues the users of a getaway car that crashed, and James arrests the same man twice.
Police armed with tasers take part in an operation to arrest a man accused of assaulting a pregnant woman, and a car hits 80mph in a 30 zone before crashing.
Crime documentary series. In this episode, interceptor Barry outsmarts a disqualified driver and Carl makes a jaw-dropping discovery when he pulls a car over in the early hours.
Barry hunts a lad wanted for assault, the police are on the tail of a suspected drug dealer and a drink driver tries everything to avoid giving a breath sample.
A foul-mouthed pensioner pushes Barry's patience to the limit, and Sarah Capes gives a bad boy biker an early birthday present.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Specialist car recovery companies help local governments and businesses take care of illegal or dangerous vehicles by getting them off the road.
Tane's world is turned upside down. Can Jo really trust her new boyfriend? Cash fears for his friend.
Harper's guilt surges. Cash struggles with the rules. Sonny's frustration gets the better of him.
The victim of a road traffic accident is unaware that he might have a broken neck.
A global internet outage causes systems to go down so the team are back to basics. In paediatrics, Henry, has fallen off a climbing and shattered his front teeth.
A man suffering a suspected cardiac arrest collapses at the wheel, crashing his car. And a holiday ends abruptly when a man tumbles out of the hot tub in a remote log cabin.
An elderly man is in dire straits after being run over by a motorcycle. A man struggles after being stabbed multiple times, including in the neck.
Dr Emma McMullen has a painful nail condition to diagnose; Dr Natalia Spierings tries to figure out why a shoulder lump is oily; and Dr Adil Sheraz deals with a mole on a mole.
